data.body:
[Blue Archive x Discord Quest Event Notice]

A "Blue Archive Quest" event will be held on Discord.

Play Blue Archive on PC (Steam) with your Discord client open for 15 minutes to get the following rewards.

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3274080
![G6usxhTbkAAwn5s.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/h92KEiJ41YXLfSHEE4VOexcJ2wGKriAS.jpg)
